avoidSaying: provide the energy to you to support your working
sentencePatterns: ... can give you the energy to ...
Breakfast gives me the energy to ...
realLifeExamples: Having breakfast can give you the energy to work through the whole day.
A short break can give you the energy to focus again.
usageNotes: 表达“给你精力去做某事”时，give you the energy to ... 比 provide the energy to you to ... 自然得多。
productionPrompts: 用 ... can give you the energy to ... 造一句和生活或学习有关的句子。
